sections.title: 一、完形填空
sections.instruction: 阅读短文，理解其大意，从 A、B、C、D 四个选项中选出可以填入空白处的最佳选项。
sections.passage:
Last summer, I went to Yunnan on vacation. Let me tell you about my trip there.
Yunnan is in the south of our country. It is really a very beautiful place with high mountains, clean rivers and friendly people. Trees and flowers are [1] Every year, a lot of [2] spend their holidays in Yunnan. On the [3] day, I visited the Stone Forest(石林). There are different kinds of stones. Of all the stones, the stone which [4] a beautiful girl named Ashima is the most famous. I took a lot of photos that day. I went to Lijiang on the second day. A river runs [5] the whole town. The river can help you know [6] you are and how to get to different places. If you don't go along the river, [7] you will get lost. I really enjoyed walking around the town. There I saw many buildings. Some of them are new, but some of them are very old. I [8] what life was like there in the past. On the third day, I went to Kunming Zoo. In the zoo, I saw some cute animals, such as elephants, monkeys and peacocks(孔雀). In the evening, I tried Yunnan Guoqiao Rice Noodles for dinner. They were really [9] ! I liked them very much. Do you want to pay a visit to Yunnan? If you need more [10] please e-mail me at 44893672@qq.com.

questions.explanation: 根据上下文，云南是一个非常美丽的地方，有高山、清水，因此到处（everywhere）都是树木和鲜花。
在云南度假的应当是游客（visitors）。
后文提到 'on the second day'（第二天），'On the third day'（第三天），因此这里指第一天（first day）。
look like 意为“看起来像”。这里指“看起来像阿诗玛的石头”。
一条河流穿过（through）整个城镇。
河流能帮助你知道你身在何处（where）。
如果不沿着河走，也许（maybe）会迷路。
wonder 意为“想知道”，符合语境，即我想知道过去那里的生活是什么样子的。
云南过桥米线非常美味（delicious），我很喜欢。
information 意为“信息”。如果需要更多信息，请发邮件。

sections.title: 二、阅读理解
sections.instruction: 阅读下面语言材料，从每题所给的 A、B、C、D 四个选项中选出最佳选项。
sections.passage:
It's a sunny and lovely day in Tianjin, as 21-year-old Liang Jieyi walks through the heart of the city, enjoying the beauty of the old buildings along her way.
"City Walk' is the coolest and the most popular way to visit a place, especially(尤其) for young people," she said.
According to an article on social media by the Ministry of Culture and Tourism(文旅部), "City Walk" is a new and relaxing way to take a trip. The key point is to have a slow-paced(慢节奏的) and immersive(沉浸式的) experience in the city, unlike travelling tiredly in the old days, visiting as many places as possible in a very short time.
Liang said she first found this way to travel on the lifestyle platform on the Internet earlier this year. There were hundreds of photos posted on the platform by users, all of which were taken as they walked along streets with views of different places of interest.
"I just walked through different cities with beautiful buildings and great food. To my surprise, the photos I took to share my 'walks' through Beijing's hutongs were already liked by hundreds of people on the Internet," she added.

questions.prompt: Which of the following pictures is "City Walk"?
options: A. [*VISUAL: People walking on a city walkway*]
C. [*VISUAL: A person riding a bicycle on a forest path*]
D. [*VISUAL: An airplane flying in the sky*]
questions.translation: 下列哪幅图展示的是“城市漫步”？
questions.explanation: 根据文章描述，“城市漫步”是指在城市中心漫步，欣赏沿途古建筑的美景，是一种慢节奏和沉浸式的旅行方式。图A符合这一描述。

questions.prompt: How do people usually feel when they choose "City Walk"?
questions.translation: 当人们选择“城市漫步”时，他们通常感觉如何？
questions.explanation: 根据第三段中 '"City Walk" is a new and relaxing way to take a trip.' 可知，城市漫步是让人感到放松（Relaxed）的旅行方式。

questions.prompt: Which of the following sentences can be put in the blank?
options: A. I didn't even have a plan for my trip.
B. I always made a plan before I took a trip.
C. I visited as many places as I could.
D. I love the food in China.
questions.translation: 下列哪句话可以填入文中空白处？
questions.explanation: 根据“城市漫步”轻松、慢节奏且随性的旅行特点，选项A“我甚至都没有为我的旅行做计划”最符合这种随性放松的漫步状态。

questions.prompt: What can we infer(推断) from the passage?
options: A. Only young people think "City Walk" is cool and popular.
B. Liang shared photos on the Internet to get more fans.
C. "City Walk" is a new and relaxing way to take a trip.
D. People who choose "City Walk" may enjoy a slow-paced life.
questions.translation: 我们能从文章中推断出什么？
questions.explanation: 根据第三段提到城市漫步的关键点是获得一种慢节奏（slow-paced）和沉浸式的体验，可以推断出选择城市漫步的人可能会喜欢慢节奏的生活，故选D。

sections.title: 三、阅读还原
sections.instruction: 根据短文内容，从短文后的选项中选出能填入空白处的最佳选项。选项中有两项为多余选项。
sections.passage:
Travelling is a good way to spend some time with your family and friends. Travelling not only relaxes you, but also teaches you about different cultures and customs. [1] For this reason, many people love travelling.
But the most important thing which you have to do before going anywhere is to make successful travelling plans. Here are some useful tips.
Decide your travelling place. To decide any travelling place, you can look up the tourist place, its weather, [2] But the most important is to consider whether the place is within your budget(预算).
Budget for your travelling. Money is very important for you to make a successful plan. Then make a travelling plan according to the money. [3]
Book your hotel. After you decide the place and prepare the money, you should remember to book a hotel. [4] Make a list of all visiting places according to your time and money. For this, you can ask your friends who have visited that place earlier for some advice. Besides, you can get help on the Internet. [5] You can do something new like cultural shopping and events.
During the trip, you can also enjoy delicious food of different places. Enjoy the flavor of different cultures. Enjoy each moment with your friends and family members.
wordbank: So first think of the amount of money you can afford for travel.
the best time to visit them and the way to reach the places.
If you forget it, it might happen that you won't get the staying place.
Try to do something new and try new food.
it's important to spend more time walking.
The most amazing part of travelling is enjoying delicious food and shopping for different cultural things.
You can wear some beautiful clothes when travelling.

questions.answer: The most amazing part of travelling is enjoying delicious food and shopping for different cultural things.
questions.explanation: 空格前句提到旅行不仅能让人放松，还能了解不同的文化和习俗，F项“旅行最美妙的部分就是享受美食和购买不同的文化物品”紧接着前文，且与后文“正因如此，许多人喜欢旅行”完美衔接。

questions.answer: the best time to visit them and the way to reach the places.
questions.explanation: 空格前面是“你可以查阅旅游地点、天气……”，B项“去那里旅游的最佳时间和到达这些地方的方式”是以逗号连接的并列信息，符合语境。

questions.answer: So first think of the amount of money you can afford for travel.
questions.explanation: 本段主题是预算（Budget）。前面说钱对于制定成功的计划非常重要，然后根据钱来制定计划，因此A项“所以首先考虑一下你能负担得起的旅游资金数额”最合适。

questions.answer: If you forget it, it might happen that you won't get the staying place.
questions.explanation: 本段主题是预订酒店（Book your hotel）。前句提到要记住预订酒店，C项“如果你忘记了，可能会出现没有地方住的情况”顺承上文，警告不订酒店的后果。

questions.answer: Try to do something new and try new food.
questions.explanation: 后句提到“你可以做一些新鲜的事，比如文化购物和活动”，D项“尝试做一些新鲜的事情，尝尝新食物”与后句呼应配合。

sections.title: 四、短文填空
sections.instruction: 阅读下面短文，在空白处填入一个最恰当的选项使短文通顺、连贯（本题已转换为单选题形式）。
sections.passage:
A lot of people love Malaysia. It's a [20] place with beautiful scenery(风景) and interesting people. What's more, there are many interesting [21] to do there. So every year, quite a few people go there on vacation.
A month ago, my parents decided to go to Malaysia on vacation. For the first few days, I had an [22] time. We went to a beach and we also visited [23] old palace. But on the last day of our vacation, something bad happened.
That day, we went to Penang and [24] paragliding there. After that, I was very hungry. We went to a restaurant. My parents ordered two bowls of rice, some vegetables and some fish, and I ordered a bowl of Malaysian yellow noodles. [25] ten minutes, the waiter served (端上) the noodles. I began to eat [26] Suddenly, I [27] I felt as if my mouth was on fire(着火)! I wondered what the cook put into the noodles. I kept coughing(咳嗽) and there were tears (眼泪) in my eyes. I drank about eight glasses of water. [28] around me laughed. My parents thought Malaysian yellow noodles were delicious, [29] I disliked them. And I will never eat them again.

questions.explanation: 修饰名词 place 应当使用形容词形式 wonderful（美妙的，精彩的）。
activity 是可数名词，在 many interesting 后面应当使用其复数形式 activities。
修饰名词 time 应当使用形容词 enjoyable，表示“愉快的，快乐的”。
old 以元音音素开头，且在此处为泛指“一个古老的宫殿”，应用不定冠词 an。
根据上下文，这里描述的是过去发生的事情，句子使用一般过去时，与 went 并列，故用 tried。
表示“十分钟后”，用介词 After。注意句首字母需大写。
在动词 eat 后面作宾语，应当使用宾格代词 them。
描述过去发生的事情，使用一般过去时 stopped。
根据上下文，周围的每个人都笑了，用 Everyone，位于句首首字母需大写。
前半句说父母觉得面条很美味，后半句说我不喜欢，前后有明显的转折关系，使用连词 but。
